case_title: MEL BARRIES VS. DEACON ENTERTAINMENT INC.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARRIES, MEL AS TO DEFENDANT DEACON ENTERTAINMENT INC., A DISSOLVED CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
